utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the format: each requires the type of coverage and costs. Health: has coverage description plus monthly and annual costs — fully specified. Property: has coverage description plus monthly and annual costs — fully specified. Travel: has coverage description plus monthly and annual costs — fully specified (note a minor inconsistency listing both €50,000 emergency medical and 'unlimited medical', but costs are present). Additional_services: has services and a cost statement ('Included in package pricing') — acceptable as a cost specification. Total_budget: provides monthly and annual totals with extra context — fully specified. Therefore, all 5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three providers: PrimeCare Premium Health for health, EliteHome Premium Property for property, and PrimeTravel Premium for travel. In the ground-truth ratings, the closest matching items are PrimeCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage (physical_health), EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_protection (home_content), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage (travel_insurance). These exact names correspond to ratings 6, 6, and 6 respectively.
